allow: Bash(node -e " const os = require\('os'\); const path = require\('path'\); // Vercel CLI v30+ stores config here const configDir = process.env.VERCEL_CONFIG_PATH || path.join\(os.homedir\(\), '.config', 'vercel'\); const configDir2 = path.join\(os.homedir\(\), '.vercel'\); console.log\('Config dir 1:', configDir\); console.log\('Config dir 2:', configDir2\); ")
